source_title: Meta-Harness: End-to-End Optimization of Model Harnesses

ai_summary.one_liner: Outer-loop system that searches over LLM harness code by giving proposer agents full filesystem access to prior candidates' source, traces, and scores
ai_summary.problem: LLM harnesses (code for information storage/retrieval/presentation) are hand-designed; existing text optimizers compress feedback too aggressively to optimize them
ai_summary.solution: Agentic proposer with filesystem-based full access to all prior candidates' source code, execution traces, and evaluation scores for iterative harness improvement
ai_summary.key_result: +7.7 on text classification (4x fewer tokens), +4.7 on IMO math across 5 models, #1 Haiku agent on TerminalBench-2
limitations: No scaling strategy for growing proposer context

research_gaps.question: 탐색 비용이 높아(iteration당 다수의 LLM 호출 + 평가) 소규모 태스크에서는 수작업이 더 효율적일 수 있음. 현재 3개 도메인에서만 검증
파일시스템 기반 경험 축적은 iteration이 증가할수록 proposer의 컨텍스트가 커져, 컨텍스트 윈도우 한계에 도달할 수 있으며, 이에 대한 스케일링 전략이 부재하다
